privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic FOIA-Correspondence-Test-2025 case via API during setup. The admin credentials are arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com / ArkCase1234!. The expected correspondence subject is 'Official Response - Records Request Determination'. The task description includes three body snippets (Freedom of Information Act, releasable in full, FOIA Processing Team), but the verification script (export_result.sh line 55) only validates two: 'Freedom of Information Act' and 'releasable in full'. The third snippet 'FOIA Processing Team' is not checked by the verification logic, creating a discrepancy between the metadata claim and actual verification logic.
